CheckTitle: RDS クラスターs are using non-default ports.をチェックします
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks/AWS Security Best Practices
Description: Checks if an cluster uses a port other than the default port of the データベース engine. The control fails if the RDS クラスター uses the default port.
Risk: Using a default データベース port exposes the cluster to potential セキュリティ脆弱性, as attackers are more likely to target known, commonly-used ports. This may result in 不正アクセス to the データベース or increased susceptibility to automated attacks.

Recommendation.Text: Modify the RDS クラスター to use a non-default port, and ensure that the セキュリティグループ permits access to the new port.
